scope.rationale: evals/{coco,voc}.py (pycocotools COCOeval + VOC mAP@0.5). train/eval/infer.py — @hydra.main, AdamW 2.5e-5, MultiStepLR(47,57), AMP, DDP 옵션, --resume.

steps.name: evals-coco
steps.summary: evals/coco.py — coco_eval(model, loader, device, score_thresh=0.05, max_dets=100): pred sigmoid → top-K (image×class) → orig px rescale → COCOeval('bbox'). 반환 {metric_primary=mAP@0.5:0.95, AP50, AP75, APs/APm/APl, num_predictions}.

steps.name: evals-voc
steps.summary: evals/voc.py — voc_eval(model, loader, device, num_classes=20, iou_thresh=0.5): per-class cumulative TP/FP → 11-point interpolation mAP@0.5. 반환 {metric_primary=mAP50, per_class_ap, ...}. difficult flag 는 dataset drop_difficult 에 의존.

steps.name: entrypoints-train-eval-infer
steps.success_metric: test -f train.py && test -f eval.py && test -f infer.py && python3 -c 'import train, eval, infer'
steps.summary: train.py / eval.py / infer.py — Hydra @main + seed 강제. train: AdamW(2.5e-5) + MultiStepLR(47,57) + AMP + grad_clip 1.0 + metrics.csv 기록 + ckpt 매 epoch + max_iters 옵션 (dry-run). eval: ckpt 로드 + evals.{coco,voc}_eval → eval.json. infer: 단일 이미지 → predictions.json + drawn.jpg.

steps.name: dry-run-1iter
steps.summary: dry-run-1iter: `python train.py +experiment=coco-repro-baseline seed=42 +train.max_iters=1 tag=dry-run` → runs/20260523-0041-dry-run/ 산출 (metrics.csv 1 row loss=34.87, config.yaml + git_rev.txt + seed.txt + checkpoints/last.pt). 첫 step grad_norm=NaN 은 AMP scaler 의 inf grad 감지 (정상).
